items.headline: Albemarle, biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi Buy
items.snippet: Citi raised ALB to Buy citing underappreciated growth opportunities. Global ESS battery production expected to reach 950 GWh in 2026 (+35% YoY) and 1,300 GWh in 2027 (+37%). Albemarle is key beneficiary of structural expansion in lithium demand.

items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Global ESS production rising 117% YoY. ALB Q1 2026: operating cash flow $346M, free cash flow $248M, liquidity $2.7B.

items.headline: Lithium mining concept stocks risen, Albemarle up 4.83%
items.snippet: Citi expects actual effective growth rate of global lithium mine supply in 2026 to still lag behind demand release; overall market will remain tight. Battery export tax rebate expected to go to 0% in January 2027 triggering pre-stocking wave.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC

items.headline: Albemarle Q1 2026 Earnings: Net sales +70% YoY, EBITDA tripled
items.snippet: Q1 net sales increased 70% YoY due to higher pricing and volumes. Adjusted EBITDA nearly tripled. Full-year supply chain disruption costs $70M-$90M. Global lithium consumption up 37%, energy storage demand up 117% YoY.
